hero_lede: Select the Wacken 2026 bands you want to watch live, name the playlist, and let the app create a Spotify playlist with popular tracks of each band. No login required, just get a link for your playlist and rock on! 🤘
source_note: Starter lineup data is curated from official W:O:A 2026 announcements and can be refreshed before Spotify matching.
preview_tracks: Spotify will later try to add up to {count} tracks: 10 top songs for each selected band.
ready_copy: Select the bands you want to hear and click 'Preview playlist' to see what Spotify has for each act.
playlist_name_required: Name the playlist before previewing it.
bands_required: Select at least one Wacken 2026 band.
create_success_copy: {count} tracks were added to your Wacken Spotify playlist.
create_partial_warning: Some bands could not be matched and were skipped:
create_no_tracks_error: None of the selected bands matched on Spotify, so no playlist was created.
spotify_refresh_token_missing: App-owned Spotify account is not authorized yet. The site owner needs to run the one-time setup.
